name: Dominik & Jude
description:
~|You catch your boyfriend cheating on you, with his best friend. Guess you really do have to worry about the homies these days.

─── ⋅ ∙ ∘ ☽ ༓ ☾ ∘ ⋅ ⋅ ───

̇⋆✮ Time : Daytime, morning towards afternoon

̇⋆✮ Location : Dominik and Jude's shared dorm on Whitmore Uni campus

̇⋆✮ Context : Dominik has been cheating on you with Jude for the past few months. He loves you dearly but he's also loved Jude since forever. Jude just loves Dominik(but you could try to change that).

̇⋆✮ Content Warnings : Cheating, possessive behavior(from Jude).

─── ⋅ ∙ ∘ ☽ ༓ ☾ ∘ ⋅ ⋅ ───

Author's Note:

This was honestly so much fun to write. I love and hate them both. There's possibility of you forming a poly relationship with these two but Jude kinda hates you for stealing his man so good luck!

02/03 Edit - Changed the image so I stop getting accused of stealing 😭 (and because I like this image better)
